title: Homepage loads and displays competition cards
description: Verifies that the homepage loads its primary competition browsing content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll through competition cards
Verify a list of competition cards is displayed

title: Open competition details from a card
description: Verifies that a user can open a competition’s details and see key information.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll through competition cards
Click a competition card to see details
Verify competition details are displayed including status and participants

title: Competition list remains usable after extensive scrolling
description: Verifies that scrolling does not break the ability to browse and open details.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the bottom of the competition list
Scroll back up within the competition list
Click a competition card to see details
Verify competition details are displayed

title: Competition details can be opened from different cards
description: Verifies that selecting different competitions shows different detail content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll through competition cards
Click a competition card to see details
Note the displayed participant names in the details panel
Scroll through competition cards
Click a different competition card to see details
Verify the participant names shown in the details are different from the previously noted names

title: Error or empty state is shown when competitions cannot be loaded
description: Verifies that the homepage shows an error or empty state with a retry prompt when competitions fail to load.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the competition list area to finish attempting to load
Verify an error or empty state is displayed prompting the user to retry
